name: ECDI
description_short: ECDI is a free credit assistance provider based in Columbus, Ohio. Rated 3.9/5 with 18 Google reviews, reflecting solid customer satisfaction.
description_long:
ECDI is a free credit assistance provider serving clients in Columbus, Ohio. Carrying a 3.9/5.0 Google rating from 18 reviews, ECDI has an solid reputation among consumers in the Columbus area looking to access free credit counseling and financial guidance.

Operating as a business management consultant, business to business service, financial consultant, ECDI provides a range of services for consumers seeking free credit assistance solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

Non-profit and free credit assistance providers in Columbus offer valuable resources for consumers who need help but may not be able to afford paid services. ECDI provides an important community service, and consumers should verify the organization's non-profit status and HUD-approval where applicable. Free counseling sessions can be a good starting point before committing to paid credit repair or debt relief programs.

Consumers in the Columbus, Ohio area who are considering ECDI should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any free credit assistance provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
